Thanks for your interest in HermitStash!

I'm not currently accepting pull requests — this is a personal project I maintain solo, and I'm not set up to review external code contributions right now (especially for a security-focused codebase). I'd rather be honest about that than leave PRs sitting indefinitely.

**If you've found a bug**, please open an issue instead — that's genuinely helpful and I respond to those.

**If you've found a security issue**, please report it privately per [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) rather than opening a public issue or PR.

**If you have a feature idea**, an issue describing the use case is welcome.

I appreciate you taking the time to look at this project. This policy may change in the future — see the Contributing section of the README for more context.
